main.description: Hyperboard-specific metadata for a collection. Uses the sidecar pattern with the same record key (TID) as the collection record. Hyperboards are sponsorship billboards showcasing contributors and participants.

users.description: Array of user records representing contributors or participants in this hyperboard.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this hyperboard metadata was created

user.description: A user record representing a contributor or participant.

name.description: The user's identifier, can be a DID or a simple name.

img.description: The user's profile image as a URI or image blob.
